title: JP Morgan tipped for $500m VLCC move at DSIC
content: US banking giant JP Morgan is being linked to a fresh push into crude shipping, with multiple brokers pointing to a VLCC newbuilding order worth around $500m at China’s Dalian Shipbuilding Industry Co (DSIC). Market sources say a JP Morgan-backed shipowning platform has signed for two 307,000 dwt newbuilds, with options for two more, at …
